source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Jenny looks at her weather app that shows the predicted weather and maximum temperatures for the next five days. Which of the following represents the corresponding graph of maximum temperatures?
<image1>
<image2>

requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the sample is primarily image-based.

A second step is comparing that extracted sequence to the candidate graph options to choose the match.
The task involves translating one representation (app forecast/temperatures) into another representation (graph).
verifiability: answer_type is option/choice and answer_text is a single discrete label ('B').
If the visual assets are complete, the reasoning can be checked by reading the five temperatures and matching the correct graph.
registry_passed=true supports basic asset availability, but verification confidence is reduced by the recorded image-reference mismatch.
